hero.title: Transcribe and Refine your audio locally
hero.subtitle: Transcribe and Refine runs speech recognition on your own machine with Vosk or Whisper, then optionally cleans the transcript with OpenAI. Interface language and audio language are configured separately.

status.title: Runtime status
status.description: Check which parts of the Transcribe and Refine pipeline are available before you start processing.

workflow.title: How it works
workflow.description: Transcribe and Refine combines local speech recognition with optional cloud cleanup.
workflow.step1: Upload one or more audio files in a supported format.
workflow.step2: The selected local engine transcribes the audio on this machine.
workflow.step3: The transcript is optionally cleaned with OpenAI to remove artifacts and obvious recognition noise.
workflow.step4: You can download both the raw transcript and the refined version.

settings.title: Processing settings
settings.description: Choose how Transcribe and Refine should process your files. The interface language is available in the top-right menu.

vosk.title: Vosk
vosk.description: Fast local recognition with language-specific offline models.

whisper.title: Whisper
whisper.description: Higher quality local recognition, usually slower than Vosk.

upload.title: Upload audio files
upload.description: Files are processed one by one in Transcribe and Refine, and results appear as soon as each file finishes.
upload.dropzoneTitle: Drop audio files here or click to browse
upload.hint: Supported formats: {extensions}. Maximum request size: {maxSizeMb} MB.

progress.idleDescription: Choose files and start processing when you are ready.
progress.details: Processed {processedCount} of {totalFiles} files • Engine: {engine} • Audio language: {language}

history.title: Recent results
history.description: Completed Transcribe and Refine jobs are stored in your browser history for quick access.

errors.generic: Something went wrong while processing the request.
errors.connection: Could not reach the server. Make sure the app is running on http://localhost:5000.
errors.whisper_unavailable: Whisper is not installed on this machine.
errors.openai_not_configured: OpenAI is not configured. Add OPENAI_API_KEY to your .env file.
errors.transcription_failed: No speech could be transcribed from this file.
errors.file_too_large: The file is too large. Maximum size: {max_size_mb} MB.
errors.file_not_found: The requested file was not found.
errors.download_failed: The file could not be downloaded.

summary.ready: Local transcription and cloud refinement are ready to use.
summary.openaiMissing: Local transcription is available, but cloud refinement is disabled until OPENAI_API_KEY is configured.
summary.degraded: The application is running, but some capabilities are unavailable.
